title: <div>M: why is this lady going the wrong way in the parking lot? There are clear
content:
M: why is this lady going the wrong way in the parking lot? There are clear arrows.

A: just run over this kid and his mom, they’re in our way. For some reason I’m always in a rush even when I have no where to go. And the shortest distance between us and that parking lot is that lovely family.

M: what is wrong with you? you’d mow down a crowd of people and the state of Islam will try and make claim of your act of violence.

A: this isnt an act of terrorism this is an act of laziness

M: accidentally becoming a leader of a cult because you don’t wanna take the long way around.

——————————————————————


A: all you need is a well lit room and an urgent call for adventure to find a clitoris. Or you can just take your whole palm and smush into the entire square inch of a vag.

——————————————————————


i want to be no case on my iphone rich



i was so happy when i took your bra off that you had small nipples.
context: From document: Web Sitcom Ideas — chunk 6 (chunk 6/798)
